children.text: Now serving up a great new combo:
Chili's is now a Plenti partner!

• Earn Plenti points every time you dine.
• Use points for savings on your check at Chili's and certain other Plenti partners.
• Earn even more points with special offers.
Also, with your My Chili's account, you'll receive tasty perks like a FREE dessert on your birthday and other bonus offers!
* Plenti points are earned on food and non-alcoholic beverages only, at participating Chili's locations
